candidate_a.title: Personalized Micro-Learning Website Template Service
candidate_a.target_user: Small business trainers and subject matter experts.
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: To create bite-sized, engaging online learning modules for their specific audiences without requiring advanced web development skills.
candidate_a.core_concept: A service providing customizable, mobile-responsive website templates for micro-learning content, featuring integrated interactive quiz elements and basic progress tracking.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A service offering a limited selection of pre-designed, mobile-responsive website templates specifically structured for delivering short, focused learning modules. These templates include basic content embedding and a simple quiz feature.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A single, mobile-responsive website template designed for delivering micro-learning content. It allows users to upload text, images, and short videos for up to three distinct learning 'modules'. Each module includes a simple, non-graduated multiple-choice quiz (e.g., 3 questions). No advanced progress tracking is implemented beyond basic completion indication. | Design and develop one clean, mobile-responsive website template.; Implement content upload functionality for text, images, and short videos (e.g., < 2 mins).; Integrate a simple multiple-choice quiz builder (max 3 questions per quiz).; Structure the template to support up to three distinct learning modules.; Ensure basic branding customization (e.g., logo, primary color).; Test with a small group of trainers or subject matter experts to assess ease of use and suitability for micro-learning delivery.

candidate_b.title: Personalized Micro-Learning Website Template Service
candidate_b.target_user: Small business trainers and subject matter experts.
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: To create bite-sized, engaging online learning modules for their specific audiences without requiring advanced web development skills.
candidate_b.core_concept: A service that provides highly customizable, mobile-responsive website templates pre-integrated with interactive quiz elements, progress tracking, and simple multimedia embedding, specifically for micro-learning content.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Offer a curated selection of visually clean templates that are easy to brand. Content can be structured into short 'lessons' with integrated multiple-choice quizzes, flashcards, and short video playback. Data is managed with simple internal tracking.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Create one responsive template for course delivery, featuring drag-and-drop text/image/video upload and a simple, non-graduated quiz module, suitable for up to three distinct learning 'modules'.

candidate_a.title: AI-Powered Allergy-Aware Meal Planner & Grocery Service
candidate_a.target_user: Individuals with multiple severe food allergies or dietary restrictions who struggle to find safe and enjoyable meal solutions.
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Difficulty in finding diverse, appealing, and consistently safe meal options and efficiently managing groceries while adhering to strict dietary needs.
candidate_a.core_concept: A service that uses AI to generate personalized meal plans and curated grocery boxes that guarantee 100% avoidance of listed allergens/restrictions, tailored to individual taste preferences.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Customers input a detailed list of allergies, intolerances, and preferences. The AI algorithm selects from vetted recipes and ingredient suppliers to create weekly meal plans and shop for users.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Create a web-based form for users to input severe allergies (e.g., nut, dairy, gluten) and test recipes for a 7-day meal plan for 15 users. Provide a shopping list of pre-approved safe ingredients (no full grocery delivery in prototype).

candidate_b.title: AI-Powered Allergy-Aware Meal Planner & Grocery Service
candidate_b.target_user: Individuals with multiple severe food allergies or dietary restrictions who struggle to find safe and enjoyable meal solutions.
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Difficulty in finding diverse, appealing, and consistently safe meal options and efficiently managing groceries while adhering to strict dietary needs.
candidate_b.core_concept: A personalized meal planning and grocery service that prioritizes safety for individuals with severe food allergies and dietary restrictions, using technology to manage complexity.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A personalized meal planning service that generates safe, allergy-aware meal plans and corresponding shopping lists for individuals with severe dietary restrictions.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Develop a web-based form where users can input a detailed list of severe allergies (e.g., nuts, dairy, gluten, soy) and dietary preferences. Based on this input, the service will generate a 7-day meal plan with recipes and a corresponding shopping list of pre-approved, safe ingredients. The focus is on testing the accuracy and safety of the generated meal plans and shopping lists, and the user experience of inputting restrictions and receiving the plan. | Develop a user-friendly web form for inputting allergies and preferences.; Curate a database of recipes and ingredients that are verified to be free of common severe allergens.; Implement a system (initially rule-based, not necessarily complex AI) to generate a 7-day meal plan and shopping list based on user input.; Onboard 15 beta users with severe allergies.; Provide users with their personalized meal plans and shopping lists.; Collect feedback on the safety, variety, and usability of the generated plans and lists.

candidate_a.title: Kinetic Rhythm Training Tool
candidate_a.target_user: Amateur musicians and dancers looking to improve their internal tempo and rhythmic precision.
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Need a more engaging and effective way to train their sense of rhythm beyond metronomes.
candidate_a.core_concept: A game that helps users improve their sense of rhythm by providing engaging, visual, and kinesthetic feedback tied to precise timing and rhythmic patterns, moving beyond traditional metronomes.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A mobile rhythm game where players tap or hold on their screen in time with visual cues that are synchronized to a pre-defined audio track. The game focuses on accuracy of timing relative to the beat and subdivisions, providing immediate visual feedback on performance.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A mobile application featuring a core gameplay loop where users tap on the screen in time with a simple, repeating audio pulse (e.g., a 4/4 beat at 120 BPM). The MVP includes five distinct difficulty levels, each presenting a slightly more complex rhythmic pattern within the 4/4 time signature (e.g., eighth notes, sixteenth notes). Visual feedback (e.g., color change, score multiplier) indicates timing accuracy (early, on-time, late). | Set up a mobile development environment (e.g., Unity, native iOS/Android).; Implement a core tap input system with precise timing measurement.; Integrate a simple audio playback system.; Design and implement five distinct rhythmic patterns with increasing complexity (within 4/4).; Develop visual feedback for timing accuracy (e.g., hit window, score display).; Create a basic UI for level selection and score display.

candidate_b.title: Kinetic Rhythm Training Tool
candidate_b.target_user: Amateur musicians and dancers looking to improve their internal tempo and rhythmic precision.
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Need a more engaging and effective way to train their sense of rhythm beyond metronomes.
candidate_b.core_concept: A game that visualizes complex rhythmic patterns as interactive mazes or paths in an abstract 3D space. Players control a tempo marker to stay 'on beat' or tap precisely on nodal points aligned with sub-beats, encouraging kinesthetic rhythmic learning.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Develop precise beat-detection algorithms. Design progressively complex rhythmic challenges incorporating polyrhythms and syncopation. Use dynamic visual feedback synchronized to audio cues to indicate accuracy. Implement progressive difficulty tiers unlocking new rhythmic patterns.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Build a core game loop where a user taps on their screen in time with audio pulses. Create five distinct difficulty levels featuring increasingly complex 4/4 rhythmic subdivisions, with visual feedback for accuracy.

candidate_a.title: Localized Community Skill Exchange Bartering
candidate_a.target_user: Residents within a defined geographic neighborhood seeking to trade goods or services without monetary exchange.
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Need a simple, trustworthy platform to offer skills or goods (e.g., tutoring, gardening help, baked goods) and find others within their immediate community with complementary needs and offers.
candidate_a.core_concept: Facilitating skill and goods bartering within a defined local community, emphasizing trust and non-monetary exchange.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A moderated online board for a specific neighborhood where residents can list skills/goods they offer and needs they have, facilitating direct, manual bartering proposals.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A single-city, web-based platform requiring email verification for user accounts. Users can create profiles listing skills/goods they offer and items/services they need within their neighborhood. A moderated 'Offer/Request Board' displays these listings. Users can browse listings and submit a 'Barter Proposal' to another user via a simple internal messaging system. The platform does not enforce a point system or automated matching; all exchanges are proposed and agreed upon manually by users, with community moderators available to resolve disputes or verify neighborhood residency if needed. | Develop a web application with user registration (email verification).; Create user profile pages to list 'Offers' and 'Needs'.; Implement a moderated 'Offer/Request Board' for browsing listings.; Build a simple internal messaging system for users to propose exchanges.; Define clear community guidelines and moderation processes.; Focus on a single, well-defined neighborhood or small city for initial launch.; Manual moderation of new user sign-ups and listings to ensure local relevance and prevent spam.

candidate_b.title: Localized Community Skill Exchange Bartering
candidate_b.target_user: Residents within a defined geographic neighborhood seeking to trade goods or services without monetary exchange.
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Need a simple, trustworthy platform to offer skills or goods (e.g., tutoring, gardening help, baked goods) and find others within their immediate community with complementary needs and offers.
candidate_b.core_concept: A hyper-local web and mobile platform facilitating skill and good bartering through a point-based system earned by offering and redeemed by receiving within the same authenticated community boundary.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Develop a geospatial verification system linked to simple user profiles where individuals list offered/needed services and items. A curated notification system alerts users of direct reciprocal matches or matches near their location.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A single-city web platform that requires email verification and basic address information (with privacy obfuscation for public listing) to access a moderated offer/request board. Users can manually propose exchanges or flag potential matches that get reviewed by a community moderator.
